meta.message: New placement: Healthcare Assistant for domiciliary care provider in Eastbourne BN21. Full time Mon-Fri days, £13.50 PAYE. Valid driving licence and own car essential. 6 months UK care experience required. Enhanced DBS needed. Start within 2 weeks. No sponsorship. Please source and screen suitable candidates.

role.title: Healthcare Assistant (HCA)
role.shift_pattern: Full time — Monday to Friday, days

essential_requirements: Minimum 6 months UK care experience (domiciliary or residential)
Own vehicle — essential for community care runs
Right to work in the UK — no sponsorship available
Availability Monday to Friday, daytime hours
desirable_criteria: Experience in domiciliary / community care setting
Local to Eastbourne / BN postcode area

compliance_checks_required: Enhanced DBS check (on update service preferred)
Two satisfactory professional references (most recent employer must be included)
Proof of own vehicle and valid insurance for business use
Minimum 6 months UK care experience verified via reference or employment history

submission_instructions.notes: Driving licence and own car are non-negotiable — do not submit anyone without both. Confirm business use insurance cover at screening. No sponsorship under any circumstances. Send candidate profiles back via Sourcing_to_Architect.json marked as unread.
